_doc: Three scenarios driven by the in-tree mock-fs CLI. The first two exercise the v1 PS-driven flow (the `mock-scenario` CI job runs them on windows-latest). The third exercises the v2 recipe dispatcher on any host and runs in CI everywhere — no Windows / VM / WinFsp needed.

v2-recipe-host-only._doc: v2 recipe shape: every step runs on the orchestrator host. Demonstrates that consumers can drive sequential ops via the dispatcher without a VM, and that `{scenario.image}` / `{step.path}` substitution lands in the resolved command.
